prompt: Run the Telegram-triggered StockHive single-ticker flow. Read single-agent-system/runtime/telegram-single-run-input.json. Pull recent inbound Telegram messages, extract exactly one ticker from the latest actionable message, run technical/fundamental/sentiment specialist agents in parallel for that ticker, aggregate the payload, run agent-system/scripts/decision_engine.py, and publish through telegram-publisher. If no actionable inbound message is available, return status no_action.
